sentences.target: Der Tourist fragt nach dem Bahnhof.

translations.de: Der Tourist fragt nach dem Bahnhof.
translations.en: The tourist asks for the train station.
translations.es: El turista pregunta por la estación de tren.
translations.fr: Le touriste demande où est la gare.
translations.it: Il turista chiede dov’è la stazione.
translations.pt: O turista pergunta onde fica a estação de trem.
translations.tr: Turist tren istasyonunun nerede olduğunu soruyor.
translations.vi: Du khách hỏi ga tàu ở đâu.
translations.ar: السائح يسأل أين تقع محطة القطار.
translations.nl: De toerist vraagt waar het station is.
translations.hu: A turista megkérdezi, hol van a vasútállomás.
translations.hi: पर्यटक पूछता है कि रेलवे स्टेशन कहाँ है.
translations.el: Ο τουρίστας ρωτά πού είναι ο σιδηροδρομικός σταθμός.
translations.id: Turis bertanya di mana stasiun kereta.
translations.cs: Turista se ptá, kde je nádraží.
translations.ja: 観光客が駅はどこかと尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; determiner of the subject noun 'Tourist'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; serves as the subject of 'fragt'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; governs a prepositional object with 'nach' + dative.
Preposition selecting the dative; introduces the PP 'nach dem Bahnhof', indicating what is being asked for.
Definite article; dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Bahnhof' within the PP headed by 'nach'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular as the object of 'nach'; completes the prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Ich helfe dem Touristen mit der Karte.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːm tuˈʁɪstən mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈkaʁtə/

translations.de: Ich helfe dem Touristen mit der Karte.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːm tuˈʁɪstən mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈkaʁtə/
translations.en: I help the tourist with the map.
translations.es: Ayudo al turista con el mapa.
translations.fr: J’aide le touriste avec la carte.
translations.it: Aiuto il turista con la mappa.
translations.pt: Eu ajudo o turista com o mapa.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp du khách xem bản đồ.
translations.nl: Ik help de toerist met de kaart.
translations.hi: मैं पर्यटक को नक्शा देखने में मदद करता हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω τον τουρίστα με τον χάρτη.
translations.ro: Îl ajut pe turist cu harta.
translations.ja: 観光客が地図を見るのを手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of 'helfe'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; takes a dative object ('dem Touristen') and a PP with 'mit' + dative.
Definite article; dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Touristen' (indirect object of 'helfe').
Common noun; masculine; dative singular form due to n-declension (weak noun); indirect object of 'helfe'.
Preposition selecting the dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative PP.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Karte' within the PP headed by 'mit'.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as the object of 'mit'; denotes the instrument used.

sentences.target: Ein Tourist macht ein Foto vom Rathaus.
sentences.reading: /aɪ̯n tuˈʁɪst maxt aɪ̯n ˈfoːtoː fɔm ˈʁaːthaʊ̯s/

translations.de: Ein Tourist macht ein Foto vom Rathaus.
translations.ipa: /aɪ̯n tuˈʁɪst maxt aɪ̯n ˈfoːtoː fɔm ˈʁaːthaʊ̯s/
translations.en: A tourist takes a photo of the town hall.
translations.es: Un turista toma una foto del ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Un touriste prend une photo de l’hôtel de ville.
translations.it: Un turista scatta una foto del municipio.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位游客拍市政厅的照片。
translations.yue: 有個遊客影市政大樓嘅相。
translations.pt: Um turista tira uma foto da prefeitura.
translations.tr: Bir turist belediye binasının fotoğrafını çekiyor.
translations.vi: Một du khách chụp ảnh tòa thị chính.
translations.nl: Een toerist maakt een foto van het stadhuis.
translations.hi: एक पर्यटक नगर भवन की तस्वीर लेता है.
translations.el: Ένας τουρίστας βγάζει φωτογραφία το δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: En turist tar bilde av rådhuset.
translations.sv: En turist tar ett foto på stadshuset.
translations.ro: Un turist face o poză cu primăria.
translations.da: En turist tager et billede af rådhuset.
translations.ja: 観光客が市役所の写真を撮ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article; nominative singular masculine; determiner of the subject 'Tourist'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of 'macht'.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking the direct object 'ein Foto'.
Indefinite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner of the direct object 'Foto'.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object of 'macht'.
Preposition (contracted form of 'von dem'); selects the dative; introduces the PP modifying 'Foto' ('photo of/from the town hall').
Common noun; neuter; dative singular as complement of 'von'; completes the PP 'vom Rathaus'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist Tourist in Berlin.

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist Tourist in Berlin.
translations.en: My brother is a tourist in Berlin.
translations.es: Mi hermano es turista en Berlín.
translations.fr: Mon frère est touriste à Berlin.
translations.it: Mio fratello è turista a Berlino.
translations.pt: Meu irmão é turista em Berlim.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi là khách du lịch ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is toerist in Berlijn.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई बर्लिन में पर्यटक है.
translations.pl: Mój brat jest turystą w Berlinie.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου είναι τουρίστας στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Broren min er turist i Berlin.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya turis di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min bror är turist i Berlin.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este turist în Berlin.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je turista v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min bror er turist i Berlin.
translations.ja: 私の兄はベルリンで観光しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine; modifies 'Bruder'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of 'ist'.
Copula auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate noun 'Tourist'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular used predicatively; predicate complement after 'ist'.
Preposition; with static location takes dative; introduces a locative PP.
Proper noun; uninflected form; object of the preposition 'in'; denotes location.
